problem: Why do amyloid plaques form in Alzheimer's and can they be cleared?
mechanism: Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier
hypothesis: Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier may resolve Why do amyloid plaques form in Alzheimer's and can they be cleared? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 32 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
